requirements.desc: R1: src/lib/constants.js 新設（全enum定数集約）
requirements.note: `src/lib/constants.js` was added and exports all required enums as `Object.freeze([...])`.

requirements.desc: R2: phases.js 廃止・import先変更
requirements.note: `src/flow/lib/phases.js` was deleted; imports were updated in target files and `tests/unit/flow/phases-review.test.js`.

requirements.desc: R3: flow set issue — 正の整数バリデーション
requirements.note: `set-issue.js` now enforces digit-only input and `>= 1`, rejecting 0/negative/decimal/non-numeric with positive-integer messaging.

requirements.desc: R4: flow set summary — 要素型バリデーション
requirements.note: Array element validation was added, but object validation only requires `text` (does not strictly require full `{text, status}` shape). Empty array is accepted.

requirements.desc: R5: flow run gate --phase — enum バリデーション
requirements.note: `run-gate.js` validates against `VALID_GATE_PHASES`, includes valid values in error, and keeps default `pre`.

requirements.desc: R6: flow set step — status enum バリデーション
requirements.note: `set-step.js` validates `status` with `VALID_STEP_STATUSES` and reports allowed values.

requirements.desc: R7: flow set req — index範囲+status検証
requirements.note: `set-req.js` rejects negative/non-numeric index via strict non-negative integer parsing and validates `status` with `VALID_REQ_STATUSES`.

requirements.desc: R8: flow run review --phase — enum バリデーション
requirements.note: `run-review.js` now validates optional phase against `VALID_REVIEW_PHASES` and includes valid values in error.

requirements.desc: R9: flow run impl-confirm --mode — enum バリデーション
requirements.note: `run-impl-confirm.js` now validates mode with `VALID_IMPL_CONFIRM_MODES` and includes valid values in error.

requirements.desc: R10: flow run finalize --merge-strategy — 定数参照化
R11: flow set auto — 定数参照化

unplanned.change: New spec process document added; not part of R1-R12 implementation requirements.
New flow tracking metadata added; not covered by functional requirements.
New issue log metadata added; not covered by functional requirements.
New QA template/document added; not covered by R1-R12.
New review notes file added; not covered by implementation requirements.
New feature spec document added; not itself a requirement outcome.
New spec-test documentation added; outside R1-R12.
New dedicated spec verification tests added; not explicitly required in R1-R12 list.

summary.notes: Implementation is largely aligned with the 12 requirements; only R4 is partial because `{text, status}` object validation is not fully enforced (status field/type not required).
